nasb.text: For who in the skies is comparable to the Lord? Who among the sons of the mighty is like the Lord,

esv.text: For who in the skies can be compared to the Lord? Who among the heavenly beings is like the Lord,

cnv.text: 在天上，誰能和耶和華相比呢？ 在全能者的眾子中，誰能像耶和華呢？

ccb.text: 天上有谁能与耶和华相比， 众天使中谁能像祂？

csbs.text: 在那云霄之上，有谁能与耶和华相比呢？ 在神的众子中，有谁能像耶和华呢？
